title: Verify Pause Trial Functionality and UI State Change
description: Tests that a user can pause their trial and that the UI on the homepage and Trial Corner correctly reflects the 'Paused' state.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the target cohort.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub and click 'Pause Trial'.
2. On the intervention pop-up, click 'Pause Anyway'.
3. Verify the trial status is now 'Paused'.
5. Observe the homepage widget, which should now reflect the paused state.
6. Navigate back to the Trial Corner and verify content sections are locked.

expected_result: The trial is paused. The homepage widget and Trial Corner UI update to the 'paused' design. Premium content is inaccessible. The 'pause-clicked' event is triggered.
